blueprint_review.strategy: checkpoint-gated bisect — 7 checkpoints + regression block, all describe.skip-gated
checkpoints: CP2: makeScopedClient — Proxy wrapping with namespace→capability gating
CP3: makeScopedShell — tagged template gate + method passthrough
CP4: makeScopedFetch — network.fetch gate + overload support
CP5: makeFilteredEnv — secret-pattern stripping + secrets.access gate
CP6: PluginInput scoping for external plugins (integration wiring)
CP7: Built-in plugins receive unscoped input (trust:built-in bypass)
key_design_decisions: CP1-CP5 use pure synchronous tests (Set<string> → mock objects); no Effect runtime needed
CP6-CP7 test the wiring contract; full Effect integration in regression suite
Cumulative checkpoints: prior CPs stay unskipped as regression guards
No require() — all dynamic await import() per Bun/Vite convention
blueprint_review.smoke_test_steps: 12-step linear progression: bisect CPs 1-7 → regression block → full plugin test suite → bun typecheck → SDK rebuild
blueprint_review.regression_suite: 13 existing plugin test files + bun typecheck + sdk build
